Software Reset

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0x88
Size:
0x4
Source:
uart_rf.rdl

Description

Write-only shadow register providing independent resets without modifying FCR. All bits are self-clearing. Only present when SHADOW is configured.

Contents

Bits Identifier Access Reset Decoded Name
[31:3] reserved rw 0x0 -
[2] xfr w 0x0 XFR
[1] rfr w 0x0 RFR
[0] ur w 0x0 UR

Field Descriptions

xfr - XFR

XMIT FIFO Reset. Shadow of FCR[2]. Resets the TX FIFO control logic.

rfr - RFR

RCVR FIFO Reset. Shadow of FCR[1]. Resets the RX FIFO control logic.

ur - UR

UART Reset. Asynchronously resets the entire UART.
